name: @doclocalizer/desktop
description: AI-powered document localization for privacy-conscious teams
author: zimablue-io

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @doclocalizer/core build && pnpm --filter @doclocalizer/ui build && concurrently "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node scripts/rename-cjs.js && electron ."
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @doclocalizer/core build && pnpm --filter @doclocalizer/ui build && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node scripts/rename-cjs.js
scripts.electron:build: vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node scripts/rename-cjs.js && electron-builder
